abstract.text: Specifies a
identifier for components and settings.

inlineContent.text: is a strongly typed wrapper encapsulating a string for unique identifier.
It enables consistent labeling, lookup and comparison across interna systems, frequently
used as keys in parameter maps, presets, or runtime state.
This type simplifies the creation of unique keys with predictable behavior.
Equality and hashing are based on the underlying
identifiers across DSP nodes or settings
without relying on raw strings for internal comparisons.
